meta.homeDescription: Curly Brackets is a small indie game developer creating compact puzzle games.
meta.gameDescription: Gravity Maze is a compact puzzle game about rotating gravity and finding a path through each maze.

home.title: Small puzzle games with clean rules and satisfying movement.
home.description: Curly Brackets builds compact games focused on readable mechanics, crisp feedback, and short sessions that still leave room for mastery.
home.heroImageAlt: Abstract Gravity Maze game board preview
home.gravityMazeCardDescription: A compact puzzle game about rotating gravity, reading the maze, and finding the cleanest route to the exit.
home.gravityMazeCardImageAlt: Gravity Maze screenshot with puzzle board, player, fragments, and exit.

game.title: Gravity Maze
game.description: Rotate the direction of gravity, slide through narrow corridors, collect fragments, and land on the exit before the maze catches up with you.
game.shotOneLabel: Gravity Maze level with blue player and yellow collectables
game.shotTwoLabel: Gravity Maze level with diagonal route and exit
game.shotThreeLabel: Portrait-oriented Gravity Maze level with a tall drop challenge
game.aboutParagraphOne: Gravity Maze is designed for quick sessions and careful problem solving. Each level asks you to think about walls, momentum, and the next safe landing before you rotate the maze.
game.aboutParagraphTwo: The game is lightweight, readable on mobile screens, and built around short levels that gradually introduce new layouts and constraints.
